creator: matheny@cs.purdue.edu
text: On a freebsd 3.3 firewall the ipfw rule is set to open. However, ports 137-139 appear as filtered when a portscan is done. We have checked with the DSL provider and the DSL modem manufacturer to see if the modem has filtering capabilities or the service provider filters and the answer to these questions was no. Question: Why would the ports come back with filtered if were not using a tcp wrapper and the firewall type is open?
